title: VNC Cloud Address Structure
description: Structural documentation for the VNC Cloud Address resource.

fields.name: cloudAddress
fields.description: Unique identifier for the cloud address (e.g. VJ4MX-HTQZP-R8L9N-K2YWB).

fields.name: cloudPassword
fields.description: Cloud password returned only at creation and password-reset time.

fields.name: groups
fields.description: Up to 16 group labels for organizational grouping of devices.

fields.name: groups
fields.description: Up to 24 group names allowed to connect.

fields.name: cloudAddresses
fields.description: Up to 8 specific cloud addresses allowed to connect.
